title: Incandescent Banking Flame: team-member closeout — Director authority discharged to Secret at Moment 2; thin closeout per PDR-075 discipline
body:
Team-member closeout — Incandescent Banking Flame / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / aa986e.

Director authority transferred to Secret Creeping Moth at Moment 2 event 2026-05-23T13:27:29Z. Closing per session-handoff SKILL "Team Member, Not Closeout Owner" path. Director Secret is session closeout-owner; thin per PDR-075 substrate-writing discipline.

- **Boundary owned**: Director role, 12:52Z → 13:27Z (~35-minute window). Sixth Director of the day, fifth role-transition; first window where PDR-075 substrate-writing discipline was tested as the handoff shape rather than synthesised-comprehensive-record. The discipline held — Secret bootstrapped from substrate event `56b51598` alone with no handoff-record-synthesis dependency (their 13:21:48Z directed event confirms).

- **Outcome**: substrate emitted, not synthesised. Pointer to dated comms-event range `5fbf6f92` (Moment 1, 13:25:53Z) — that event lists the priority substrate events `56b51598` (metacognition reframe), `02fa64cf` (routing-contradiction worked instance), `8876e6b5` (tick #1 with recursion-of-doctrine triple) plus the live in-flight directed-event chain (Twilit Weaving Moon PDR-075 framing + verdict; Twilit Scattering Twilight bundle-marshal stewardship + codex-side adversarial waiver; Zephyrous ADR-185 v2 GO; Pearly S6564 disposition re-route now orphaned and held for post-Moment-2 routing by Secret).

- **Evidence**: dated comms-event range 12:52Z–13:27Z. Five worked instances of recursion-of-doctrine in the window (Seaworthy/Secret/Twilit ST/Incandescent×2) all named in substrate events 02fa64cf and the Secret-catch in e5611b39. PDR-075 ratification trail: substrate events 56b51598 + 02fa64cf + 8876e6b5 + Secret's bootstrap-from-substrate-alone at 13:21:48Z + Twilit Weaving Moon PDR-075 v1 draft with my GO verdict at 487a20d5. ADR-185 v2 absorbed Pearly's four conditions; landed GO.

- **Claims / queue / git state**: no claims under Incandescent. No commit-queue intents. Working tree carries multi-agent in-flight surface (Twilit Scattering Twilight cure-bundle-v2; Seaworthy doc-edit; Zephyrous ADR-185-v2; multiple Sonar-fix bundles; PDR-075 draft) — none mine. Cron `130cdcd0` deleted at Moment 2 per cadence-boundary rule.

- **Session complete announcement**: Incandescent Banking Flame session `aa986e` closing. Comms watcher `bwtdmmutb` stopping after this broadcast.

- **Retained claims**: NONE.

- **Pickup notification**: none required. Secret holds all routing authority + the inherited in-flight items pointed at in Moment 1 event `5fbf6f92`.

- **Surprise / changed understanding** worth substrate absorption by Director Secret (already in comms stream, naming for closeout pointer):
  - The substrate-writing discipline materialised in real time across this window — five worked instances of the recursion-of-doctrine pattern, each caught and emitted as substrate rather than absorbed for closeout. Secret's catch of my fifth (Pearly-closed-session routing) was the cleanest demonstration: incoming Director caught outgoing Director under cadence pressure, with the cure-shape verdict-and-default protocol I had named at 13:22:31Z applied to my own contradiction by Secret.
  - The handover process itself produced PDR-075's worked-instance evidence end-to-end. Twilit Weaving Moon's PDR-075 v1 cites 5 instances supporting Candidate status; the cross-session ratification trigger remains pending future-session validation.

- **Blockers or risks**: none from my side. Codex pool wound down per owner compaction-prep direction; Sonar MCP gateway unavailability blocks the S6564 dispositions; surface to owner for Sonar-capable session re-engagement is the natural path. Director Secret inherits the routing decision.

- **Handoff needed**: nothing further from me. Session 8d8d93 (Twilit Scattering Twilight) holds bundle-marshal stewardship; Seaworthy holds commit-marshal across compaction; Twilit Weaving Moon holds PDR-075 + --tags CLI; Secret holds Director routing.

Substantive thanks to the team — Twilit Weaving Moon's contradiction-catch + Secret's catch + Seaworthy's marshal patience + Twilit Scattering Twilight's atomic-landing discipline + Pearly's adversarial review + Zephyrous's spec authorship and ADR drafting + the codex pool's coordinated closeouts produced a session that ratified its own metacognitive cure-shape in flight. The handover IS improvement material; that was the owner's direction and the team delivered it.

— Incandescent Banking Flame / claude / aa986e (outgoing Director, closing)
